default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore GrowthX's AI-driven content services for JFrog.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**JFrog's Goal:** Win the AI search (AEO) visibility race by converting its rich, unstructured internal data into high-quality, top-of-funnel content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A full-service content engine that handles strategy, production, and AEO monitoring. It's positioned as a single partner to replace JFrog's planned engagements with Aerofs (production) and Profound (monitoring).](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**JFrog's Challenge:** Lacks the internal resources and processes to synthesize its data into content, and has no formal brand or style guides.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [**Pricing:** A two-phase model. Phase 1 is an 8-week Strategy Sprint ($30k–$40k). Phase 2 is a 12-month Growth Execution plan ($15k–$18k/mo) for 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

## Topics

### JFrog's Challenge: Data-Rich, Content-Poor

  - [**Primary Objective:** Win the AI search visibility race, a key KPI for the current and next quarter, to reach enterprise buyers using LLMs for research.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [**Core Problem:** JFrog has extensive internal data but lacks the means to synthesize it into actionable content narratives.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**Resource Constraints:** Limited internal resources prevent scaling top-of-funnel content production, including video.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [**Process Gaps:** No formal brand kits or content style guides exist, creating a need for guidance on defining content identity.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: An End-to-End Content Engine

  - [**Positioning:** An extension of JFrog's team, handling the entire content lifecycle.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [**Differentiation:**](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [**Aerofs:** GrowthX's founder built workflows on Aerofs before creating a proprietary platform to solve its limitations (e.g., high costs, refactoring).](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [**Profound:** GrowthX offers a competing AEO monitoring product launching in two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Methodology:**](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks)**](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Context Engineering:** Interviews with SMEs (DevOps, DevSecOps) and ingestion of all internal resources to build a precise brand/product context for the AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
          - [**Strategy Development:** A 3–6 month roadmap is created, prioritizing topics with the highest potential for AEO/SEO visibility and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution (12 months)**](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Production:** Daily content publishing, including text, images, code snippets, and cross-linking.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
          - [**Monitoring:** Continuous tracking of LLM visibility against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Workflow & Collaboration:**](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
      - [**Current:** JFrog reviews drafts in Google Docs, providing feedback that GrowthX's editors manually ingest to refine the AI pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Future (Feb 2026):** A platform feature will allow JFrog experts to directly calibrate the AI by labeling content and flagging issues.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### Case Studies & Pricing

  - [**Augment Code:** Achieved 19% AEO visibility against GitHub and Cursor by publishing \>300 technical pages.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [**Result:** GrowthX-created articles are now cited by competitors and appear as expert answers in AI search for terms like "enterprise AI coding tools."](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [**Pricing Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Cost:** $30,000–$40,000 (one-time fixed fee)](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Term:** 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Opt-out:** JFrog can cancel the engagement if not satisfied.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution**](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Cost:** $15,000–$18,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Term:** 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
          - [**Deliverable:** 5 articles per week (mix of content types)](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Email Nick with detailed pricing information.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Send a 30-minute calendar invite for Friday before 11 AM Pacific.](https://fathom.video/share/RsxxxB5XEFL3XSLpZh8XzFUuoLNwWE9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
